# Integration

Batch correction and multi-modal representation learning.

**12 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `image_expression_attention` | `beta` | `native` | Reliability-gated fusion of image and expression features. | [image_expression_attention](../generated/image_expression_attention.md) |
| `image_expression_autoencoder` | `beta` | `native` | Joint autoencoder over expression and registered image patches. | [image_expression_autoencoder](../generated/image_expression_autoencoder.md) |
| `image_expression_contrastive` | `beta` | `native` | Scale-balanced dual-view image and expression representation. | [image_expression_contrastive](../generated/image_expression_contrastive.md) |
| `multimodal_graph_fusion` | `beta` | `native` | Image-expression fusion with spatial-neighborhood context. | [multimodal_graph_fusion](../generated/multimodal_graph_fusion.md) |
| `denoising_spatial_autoencoder` | `experimental` | `native` | Denoising autoencoder robust to expression dropout. | [denoising_spatial_autoencoder](../generated/denoising_spatial_autoencoder.md) |
| `graph_expression_autoencoder` | `experimental` | `native` | Expression autoencoder augmented with spatial-neighbor features. | [graph_expression_autoencoder](../generated/graph_expression_autoencoder.md) |
| `spatial_autoencoder` | `experimental` | `native` | Bounded autoencoder for spatial expression embeddings. | [spatial_autoencoder](../generated/spatial_autoencoder.md) |
| `variational_spatial_autoencoder` | `experimental` | `native` | Variational autoencoder with a regularized latent space. | [variational_spatial_autoencoder](../generated/variational_spatial_autoencoder.md) |
| `weave_anchor_residual_integrate` | `experimental` | `native` | Mutual cross-batch anchors followed by median residual correction. | [weave_anchor_residual_integrate](../generated/weave_anchor_residual_integrate.md) |
| `weave_spatial_quantile_integrate` | `experimental` | `native` | Batch quantile alignment with within-batch spatial blending. | [weave_spatial_quantile_integrate](../generated/weave_spatial_quantile_integrate.md) |
| `combat` | `production` | `native` | Parametric ComBat batch-effect correction (NumPy implementation). | [combat](../generated/combat.md) |
| `harmony` | `production` | `native` | Harmony embedding-space batch integration (harmonypy). | [harmony](../generated/harmony.md) |

## Decision notes

### `combat`

- Batch correction and multi-modal representation learning.
- Parametric ComBat batch-effect correction (NumPy implementation).
- Full page: [combat](../generated/combat.md)

### `denoising_spatial_autoencoder`

- Batch correction and multi-modal representation learning.
- Denoising autoencoder robust to expression dropout.
- Teaching / baseline method — not a field-standard claim.
